zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD价格围绕6.56附近窄幅震荡运行，整体仍受20日均线6.574一带压制，短线反弹持续受限，结构偏弱整理延续。

MACD指标维持-0.0246水平，空头动能占据主导，市场缺乏明确反转信号，短期反弹多为技术性修复，持续性较弱。

下方支撑关注6.55一线，若有效失守可能回撤至6.52区域寻求支撑，上方阻力位于6.57及6.60附近，突破前空间有限。

操作上建议以区间震荡思路为主，未能有效突破6.57前谨慎追多，若跌破6.55则可考虑短线顺势做空，同时严格设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 6.56, showing only a modest 24h gain of 0.89%. Price action remains compressed between 6.5545 and 6.5737, indicating low volatility and market indecision. Despite the slight upward drift, the pair is still trading marginally below the 20-period SMA at 6.57425, suggesting that short-term momentum has not yet reclaimed a bullish structure and remains mildly bearish to neutral overall.

Indicator readings reinforce a weakening momentum profile. The MACD stands at -0.0247, signaling continued bearish pressure, although the magnitude suggests it is not strongly directional. With RSI(14) unavailable, momentum confirmation is limited, but price behavior near the SMA20 implies resistance is being respected. Overall, technical signals lean slightly bearish, with upside follow-through lacking conviction unless price reclaims the short-term moving average.

Immediate support is seen at 6.5545, aligning with the session low and acting as the first defensive zone for buyers. A break below this level exposes 6.50 as a psychological support area, where stronger demand may emerge. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 6.57425, corresponding to the 20-SMA, followed by 6.60 as the next intraday barrier. A sustained move above these levels would be required to shift structure bullish.

In the current range-bound structure, traders may favor mean-reversion strategies, buying near support with tight risk controls or fading moves into resistance. Long entries are better considered near 6.55 with stops below 6.54, targeting 6.57–6.60. Alternatively, short positions can be evaluated if price rejects the SMA20 decisively. A breakout above 6.574 with volume would be needed to confirm renewed bullish momentum.
